mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM role r INNER JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM role WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role (role_name, role_code, role_description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{roleDescription}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE role
role_name = #{roleName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, role_description = #{roleDescription}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
